title: Perverting justice route bleed from fraud-document paperwork
offenceWording: Doing an act tending and intended to pervert the course of justice
mainIssue: The papers include fraud-style documents, but the charge route is perverting justice and must not become fraud/account-control.
uncertainEvidence: intent to pervert justice versus administrative/document confusion
expectedTodayIssue: Keep the route as perverting justice and chase intent/source chronology.
expectedSummaryRisk: Do not import fraud/PWITS/robbery route language; keep safety warning separate from alleged facts.
polishOnlyWarnings: safety-warning lines saying do not import fraud should not false-fail
